//: COPY-PASTE LIBRARY. This file is never rendered. To add an entry: find the matching section type below, copy one block from its 'entries' array into the real cv.json, change the values, and delete the '//' hint keys. The schema will autocomplete and validate as you type.

entries.//location: optional — shown in parentheses; delete if none
entries.committee: Prof. A (chair), Prof. B, Dr. C.

entries.//date: year or range; open ranges end with '-' (e.g. '2022-')
entries.organisation: Department of Geography and Planning, University of Liverpool.

entries.//date: always the real year; the renderer prints it once per group and blanks repeats
entries.title: Project or grant title.
entries.//amount: value is a plain number; currency is GBP | EUR | USD — the renderer prints £/€/$

sections.//: Publications are not inlined here. Point 'source' at a CSL-JSON file. Add publications there in CSL-JSON (what Zotero exports); no bespoke format to learn.
sections.title: Publications
